title: Skill Transformer Pipeline
interaction_flow: build.js → utils.js: readSourceFiles(ROOT_DIR) → { skills[] }
build.js → providers.js: import PROVIDERS (11 provider configs)
build.js → index.js: import named transformers (transformCursor, transformClaudeCode, etc.)
index.js → factory.js: createTransformer(PROVIDERS[key]) for each provider at module load time
build.js → createTransformer(config): returns transform function (closure over config)
build.js → transform(skills, DIST_DIR, { skillsVersion }): run transform for each provider
build.js → transform(skills, DIST_DIR, { prefix:'i-', outputSuffix:'-prefixed', skillsVersion }): run prefixed variant
transform → utils.js: cleanDir(providerDir) — wipe existing provider output dir
transform → utils.js: ensureDir(skillsDir) — create {provider}/{configDir}/skills/
transform [loop over skills] → build frontmatterObj { name, description, version?, ...activeFields }
transform → utils.js: generateYamlFrontmatter(frontmatterObj) → YAML string
transform → utils.js: replacePlaceholders(skill.body, placeholderKey, commandNames, allSkillNames) → body with {{model}}/{{config_file}} etc. resolved
transform → self: skillBody.replace(/{{scripts_path}}/g, configDir/skills/skillName/scripts)
transform [if prefix] → utils.js: prefixSkillReferences(skillBody, prefix, allSkillNames, cmdPrefix) → rewritten body
transform [if config.bodyTransform] → config.bodyTransform(skillBody, skill) → transformed body
transform → utils.js: writeFile(skillDir/SKILL.md, frontmatter + body)
transform [if skill.references] → utils.js: ensureDir(refDir), writeFile(refDir/ref.name.md, replacePlaceholders(ref.content))
transform [if skill.scripts] → utils.js: ensureDir(scriptsOutDir), writeFile(scriptsOutDir/script.name, script.content)
transform → console.log: summary (skills count, user-invocable count, ref/script file counts)
build.js → FileSystem: copyDirSync — sync dist skills back to project configDirs (.claude/skills, .cursor/skills, etc.)
test_flow: test → transform(skills, TEST_DIR) or transform(skills, TEST_DIR, { prefix, outputSuffix })
test → utils.parseFrontmatter(content) → { frontmatter, body } for field assertions

key_functions.createTransformer(config): Factory in factory.js. Accepts provider config, returns transform(skills, distDir, options) closure. Maps frontmatterFields via FIELD_SPECS to activeFields.
key_functions.transform(skills, distDir, options): Returned closure. options: { prefix='', outputSuffix='', skillsVersion='' }. Writes SKILL.md + reference + script files per skill.
key_functions.transformProvider(config, skills, distDi: Older direct function in shared.js — same logic but config includes buildFrontmatter callback. claude-code uses CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT for scripts_path.
key_functions.PROVIDERS: Map of 11 provider configs (cursor, claude-code, gemini, codex, agents, kiro, opencode, pi, trae-cn, trae, rovo-dev). Each has: provider, configDir, displayName, frontmatterFields[], optional bodyTransform, optional placeholderProvider.
key_functions.FIELD_SPECS: Map from field name to { sourceKey, yamlKey, condition?, value? }. Fields: user-invocable, argument-hint, license, compatibility, metadata, allowed-tools.

key_relationships: build.js imports createTransformer and PROVIDERS from index.js
index.js re-exports createTransformer from factory.js and PROVIDERS from providers.js
index.js calls createTransformer(PROVIDERS[key]) to produce named transformer exports
factory.js (createTransformer) depends_on utils.js: cleanDir, ensureDir, writeFile, generateYamlFrontmatter, replacePlaceholders, prefixSkillReferences, PROVIDER_PLACEHOLDERS
shared.js (transformProvider) depends_on utils.js: same set of utilities
providers.test.js uses PROVIDERS + createTransformer + parseFrontmatter + PROVIDER_PLACEHOLDERS
trae-cn provider uses placeholderProvider:'trae' (alias to trae's placeholder values)

data_structures.skill: { name, description, body, userInvocable?, argumentHint?, license?, compatibility?, metadata?, allowedTools?, references?: [{name, content, filePath}], scripts?: [{name, content}] }
data_structures.provider_config: { provider, configDir, displayName, frontmatterFields[], bodyTransform?, placeholderProvider? }

important_notes: Two parallel implementations exist: factory.js (current, used by build.js via index.js) uses FIELD_SPECS allowlist pattern; shared.js (older) uses a buildFrontmatter callback. Providers run twice: once plain, once with prefix='i-' and outputSuffix='-prefixed'. 11 providers total. trae-cn aliases trae's placeholders via placeholderProvider field. scripts_path resolution differs: shared.js has special-case for claude-code using CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT env var.
